prompt: Ultra-realistic streetwear fashion campaign poster shot from a high-angle top-down perspective of a stylish young man standing on concrete pavement, reaching one hand toward the camera with a peace sign in forced perspective. He has textured curly mullet hair with a low taper fade, light mustache and beard stubble, sharp jawline, confident relaxed expression, and natural tan skin. Wearing an oversized faded charcoal gray Stüssy t-shirt, loose blue jeans, black-and-white Converse sneakers, including handwritten-style text, small paragraph blocks, logos, QR code, and fashion campaign aesthetic. Background should remain simple raw concrete texture. Vertical poster format, high-fashion editorial look, natural shadows, 35mm lens feel, photorealistic, trendy Gen Z street style.
